home.hero_sub: Eastern cuisine rooted in centuries of tradition
home.story_text: Khan Chapan is more than a restaurant — it is a living chronicle of Uzbek culinary heritage, where every dish carries the weight of history and the warmth of ancestral hands.

story.heading: Our Story
story.name_p1: A Khan Chapan is the ceremonial robe gifted by a ruler to mark honour, respect, and belonging. To receive one is to be recognised. Khan Chapan, the restaurant, carries that same spirit: a place where every guest is received as an honoured guest of the Khan.
story.name_quote: "Every table is a throne. Every meal, an offering."
story.name_p2: Founded in Tashkent, in the historic Sebzar district, Khan Chapan was built with one purpose: to preserve the ancient culinary traditions of Central Asia and bring them into the present without apology.
story.cuisine_p1: Beshbarmak — "five fingers" — is the centrepiece of Uzbek hospitality. It is not merely a dish; it is a ritual. Guests gather, hands replace cutlery, and the act of eating becomes communal, intimate, alive.
story.cuisine_p2: Khan Chapan elevates these traditions without erasing them. Our chefs — many trained across generations of family kitchens — interpret the classics with reverence and precision.
story.team_p: Our team of over 80 people share one conviction: that food is memory made edible. Join us, and become part of the story.

loyalty.heading: Khan Coins
loyalty.step1_desc: Every visit to Khan Chapan earns you Khan Coins. The more you dine, the more you earn.
loyalty.step2_desc: Coins accumulate in your Telegram account automatically. Track your balance anytime.
loyalty.step3_desc: Use your coins for discounts, complimentary dishes, or exclusive experiences at Khan Chapan.
loyalty.telegram_text: Manage your coins and check your balance via Telegram
